senators.name: John Barrasso
senators.nerdReason: M.D. from Georgetown University School of Medicine. Practiced as a board-certified orthopedic surgeon for 24 years. Former president of the Wyoming Medical Society and named Wyoming Physician of the Year. Medical expertise informs his healthcare policy positions.
education: M.D., Georgetown University School of Medicine

senators.name: Cynthia Lummis
senators.notNerdReason: Holds two B.S. degrees in animal science and biology, showing science education. However, her career has been primarily in law, ranching, and politics. Her cryptocurrency and blockchain policy advocacy shows tech engagement, but application of scientific background in legislation is limited.
education: B.S. Animal Science, University of Wyoming

WY-01.name: Harriet Hageman
WY-01.notNerdReason: J.D. and B.S. in business administration. Career focused on natural resources litigation and water rights law. No STEM or technical background. Policy positions emphasize reducing federal regulatory authority rather than evidence-based governance.
education: J.D., University of Wyoming College of Law
B.S. Business Administration, University of Wyoming
experience: Law Clerk, U.S. Court of Appeals, 10th Circuit
